$schema: Canonical logo registry for the SkyyRose imagery pipeline. Logos with `co_located_per_sku: true` are resolved at consumption time via `assets/images/products/<sku-folder>/<filename>` — the sku-folder is the canonical render_output_slug from skyyrose-catalog.csv. All other logos live in assets/images/logos/. Every SKU's logo placements are defined here, cross-checked with skyyrose-catalog.csv::branding_spec during pre-flight. Edit both files together when adding a logo or reassigning placements.

sr-monogram-rose-gold.description: SKYYROSE BRAND PRIMARY LOGO (site-wide). Rose-gold metallic SR monogram with stylized rose flourish. Use in header, footer, favicon, loading states, mobile menu. ALSO used as embroidered placement on br-005 (Black Rose Hoodie — Signature Edition) at right chest. Confirmed brand primary 2026-05-24.

sr-monogram-gold.description: SkyyRose 'SR' monogram in warm gold finish. Used on the Signature collection as the premium colorway.

rose-gold-rose.description: SIGNATURE COLLECTION LOGO (paired with red-roses-cloud-cluster). Standalone stylized rose in rose-gold metallic. Used on sg-015 The Windbreaker Set (left chest on jacket, left thigh on pants). Part of Signature logo system.

black-roses-cloud-cluster.description: BLACK ROSE COLLECTION LOGO. Cluster of gray/black roses with green thorns emerging from clouds. 'Black Is Beautiful Series' signature rose imagery — used on NBA/NFL/MLB authentic-collection cards and as embroidered motif on Black Rose jerseys. Rendered in colorway-shifted variants (lavender, blue, purple, red) on collection-specific pieces; recolor is applied at render time, not to the source file.

red-roses-cloud-cluster.description: SIGNATURE COLLECTION LOGO (paired with rose-gold-rose). Cluster of red roses with green thorns emerging from clouds. Used on sg-009 The Sherpa Jacket (Signature) at front chest. Part of Signature logo system — NOT a Love Hurts asset. Earlier registry versions misclassified this as Love Hurts; corrected 2026-05-25.

heart-rose-composite.description: LOVE HURTS COLLECTION LOGO. Red heart wrapped in thorns with roses emerging from the top, blood splatters. The Love Hurts 'heart-and-rose' composite logo — used on lh-002 (joggers left thigh), lh-003 (basketball shorts, all-over + mesh panels), lh-004 (bomber jacket inside hood + back center), lh-005 (Fannie pack — dot of 'i' in lettering).

love-hurts-full-lettering.description: LOVE HURTS WORDMARK. Full 'Love Hurts' graffiti lettering with heart+thorns composite integrated. Used as large sublimated element on Love Hurts basketball shorts + Black Rose × Love Hurts shorts, and as front lettering on Love Hurts bomber.

love-lettering.description: Split 'Love' graffiti lettering component of the Love Hurts wordmark. Available for layouts where Love/Hurts are placed separately.

hurts-lettering.description: Split 'Hurts' graffiti lettering component of the Love Hurts wordmark. Pairs with love-lettering for split layouts.

nba-authentic-collection-card.description: 'BLACK ROSE NBA AUTHENTIC COLLECTION' card graphic — navy lettering on yellow ground, NBA logo, 'Property Of Black Is Beautiful Series' tagline. Used as custom basketball-style patch on BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series basketball SKUs. Resolved per-SKU at `products/<sku-folder>/nba-authentic-collection-card.<fmt>` — see sku_logos for placement.

nfl-authentic-collection-card.description: 'BLACK ROSE NFL AUTHENTIC COLLECTION' card graphic — navy lettering on yellow ground, NFL logo, 'Property Of Black Is Beautiful Series' tagline. Used as custom football-style patch (bottom-left corner) on BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series football SKUs. Resolved per-SKU at `products/<sku-folder>/nfl-authentic-collection-card.<fmt>` — see sku_logos for placement.

mlb-authentic-collection-card.description: 'BLACK ROSE MLB AUTHENTIC COLLECTION' card graphic — navy lettering on yellow ground, MLB logo, 'Authentic Collection' banner. Ornate footer with 'Members only — Yay Area, Ca', Skyy Rose Collection script logo with moon, and 'Made for Kings ang Queens' tagline. Used as custom baseball-style patch on BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series baseball SKUs. Resolved per-SKU at `products/<sku-folder>/mlb-authentic-collection-card.<fmt>` — see sku_logos for placement.

skyy-rose-collection-circular-patch.description: KIDS CAPSULE LOGO. 'SKYY ROSE COLLECTION' circular patch — white/gray ground with black 'SKYY ROSE' arched on top + 'COLLECTION' arched on bottom, detailed black rose bouquet emerging from cloud in center. Used on right arm of Kids Capsule hoodie sets.

hockey-championship-card.description: 'BLACK ROSE HOCKEY CHAMPIONSHIP COLLECTION' card graphic — gray/silver ground, navy lettering, hockey shield with crossed sticks + puck. Minimalist design (no 'Property Of' footer). Used as custom hockey-style patch on BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series hockey SKUs (Sharks Edition). Resolved per-SKU at `products/<sku-folder>/hockey-championship-card.<fmt>` — see sku_logos for placement.

sku_folders._comment: Canonical product image folder per SKU. Sports patches are resolved as products/<folder>/<filename>.

placements.notes: Hockey Championship card — different visual style from NBA/NFL cards (gray ground, shield with sticks+puck, minimalist).

br-015.colorway_notes: White colorway of the Baseball Classic jersey.

placements.notes: Corrected 2026-05-25: was red-roses-cloud-cluster (Signature LOGO, misclassified). Heart-rose-composite is the actual Love Hurts logo.

Signature LOGO. Pairs with rose-gold-rose system-wide as the Signature mark set.

sg-015.name: The Windbreaker Set
sg-015.notes: rose-gold-rose + red-roses-cloud-cluster are the Signature collection logo system. Tech flat at sg-015-windbreaker-set.jpg is wired as render source.

placements.notes: Same placement pattern as kids-001.

changes: Retired br-013 (Baseball Classic Oakland Edition) — confirmed duplicate of br-003. The 4 MLB-patched baseball jerseys are now br-003 (Black), br-012 (Last Oakland), br-014 (Giants), br-015 (White).

Renamed for catalog-naming consistency: br-003 → '(Black)', br-012 → 'Baseball Classic (Last Oakland)', br-014/015 dropped 'Edition' suffix. Only city-affiliated colorways carry parenthetical names beyond the color descriptor.

Sport patches (nfl/nba/mlb/hockey) moved out of assets/images/logos/ and co-located in each using SKU's product folder. Logo entries use `co_located_per_sku: true` flag; consumers resolve via `assets/images/products/<sku_folders[sku]>/<filename>`.
Added sku_folders block as canonical SKU → product-folder map for sports patches.
Added br-013, br-014, br-015 sku_logos entries (Baseball Classic Oakland/Giants/White Editions) — each with mlb-authentic-collection-card front_patch.
Corrected red-roses-cloud-cluster description — it is a SIGNATURE COLLECTION LOGO (paired with rose-gold-rose), not a Love Hurts variant. Used only on sg-009.

Corrected lh-003 + lh-004 placements that referenced red-roses-cloud-cluster: replaced with heart-rose-composite (the actual Love Hurts collection LOGO). Affects lh-003 all_over + mesh_side_panels, and lh-004 inside_hood.
Added `collection` field to logos to make Signature/Black Rose/Love Hurts/Kids Capsule ownership explicit.
Added `category` field to sport patches for compositor classification.
sr-monogram-rose-gold designated brand-primary (site-wide) — header, footer, favicon, loading states.
